children.text: Program lead production, quality, and manufacturing.

children.heading: .—Plan of Action
children.label: b .—Plan of Action
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall develop and implement a plan of action for recruiting, training, and ensuring appropriate career development of military and civilian personnel to achieve the objective established in subsection (a).
